tool_purpose: A binary classification model trained on the IMDb sentiment analysis dataset using AutoTrain. The model is capable of predicting sentiment (positive or negative) for movie reviews. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Binary Classification. API call: joblib.load('model.joblib').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
